ETHICALLY MINDED - Vegan, Against animal testing
description: Product Description Hawaiian Tropic Enriching After Sun Body Butter (250ml) Elevate your sun care routine, whilst safeguarding your skin with this indulgent after sun body butter from Hawaiian Tropic. Delivering 12-hour moisturisation to soften your skin after your sun kissed adventures. Featuring shea butter for a rich, creamy texture and silky soft skin. Infused with a delightful coconut scent to evoke those summer filled memories, it's a tropical paradise in a tub that can be enjoyed all year round. Scented to Inspire. This is your glow-ment! Key Features - Leaves your skin feeling silky soft - Rich and creamy texture - 12 hour moisturisation - Nourishing, skin-loving ingredients; shea butter - Coconut scent - Vegan - Tub made from 100% recycled material - Lid made from 35% recycled material - Paraben Free - Microplastic Free Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, Diisopropyl Adipate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Butyrospermum Parkii Butter, Mangifera Indica Seed Butter, Theobroma Cacao Seed Butter, Cetyl Alcohol, Isopropyl Myristate, Glyceryl Stearate, Cocos Nucifera Oil, Phenoxyethanol, Caprylyl Glycol, Persea Gratissima Oil, Parfum, Carbomer, Dicetyl Phosphate, Ceteth-10 Phosphate, Benzyl Alcohol, Chlorphenesin, Sodium Hydroxide, Disodium EDTA, Tocopheryl Acetate, Panthenol, Ascorbyl Stearate, Isostearic Acid, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Carica Papaya Fruit Extract, Colocasia Antiquorum Root Extract, Psidium Guajava Fruit Extract, Plumeria Acutifolia Flower Extract, Passiflora Incarnata Fruit Extract, Mangifera Indica Fruit Extract, Ascorbic Acid, CI 19140, CI 15985.
